reviews.comment:
El lugar es súper grande, tiene muchas mesitas con bancos, baños, piletas con canillas, árboles, un restaurante parrilla (con horarios, no está siempre abierto) en un súper quincho

(Translated by Google)
The place is huge, with lots of tables and benches, bathrooms, sinks with taps, trees, and a grill restaurant (with set hours, it's not always open) in a super barbecue area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEcWJta0pREAE

reviews.comment:
Tienen comida preparada caliente para poder comer de paso. Lindo parque para caminar afuera un rato

(Translated by Google)
They have hot food available for a quick bite. Nice park for a stroll.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEaWNUNHpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención rápida. Hay sector de cafetería y sector de comida, lo que agiliza mucho.
El sandwich de huevo, queso y guacamole es muy rico. No me gustó que no me avisen que el queso era cheddar

(Translated by Google)
Fast service. There's a café area and a food court, which makes things much quicker.
The egg, cheese, and guacamole sandwich is delicious. I didn't like that they didn't tell me the cheese was cheddar.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEa2YtMFdREAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre es la parada obligatoria en mis viajes de ida y vuelta a buenos aires.
El predio, la atencion, los servicios, todo es de primera.
Pero los baños son UN ASCO. Sucios, desprolijos, cuasi abandono. La ultima vez, no habia ni agua y te hacian ir al baño de la parrilla.
Cabe destacar q por ser un punto estrategico y encima ser una estacion "Full" de YPF, dispongan de unos baños tan deprorables...

(Translated by Google)
It's always a mandatory stop on my trips to and from Buenos Aires.
The grounds, the service, the amenities—everything is top-notch.

But the bathrooms are disgusting. Dirty, untidy, practically abandoned. Last time, there wasn't even water, and they made you use the bathroom by the grill.
It's remarkable that, given its strategic location and status as a full-service YPF station, they have such deplorable bathrooms...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5cE5QVXh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Para mí es un lugar lleno de lindos recuerdos. Cambió mucho, debo reconocer que antes era más gustoso para mí parecer porque se sentía más natural, menos contrucciones, más paz había. Recuerdo cuando los caminos internos eran de chinchilla blanca. Ya te hacía pensar que faltaba poco para llegar a la costa...

(Translated by Google)
For me, it's a place full of wonderful memories. It's changed a lot; I must admit that it used to be more pleasant, in my opinion, because it felt more natural, with fewer buildings and more peace. I remember when the internal paths were lined with white chinchilla grass. It made you think you were just a short distance from the coast...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEMEpMRmhBRRAB
